untranslatable_reason: Signal requires mean-reversion equilibrium calculation (lookback_period, threshold, half_life all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Exact deviation threshold from mean not specified. Without these critical parameters, only a generic mean-reversion proxy using price vs SMA can be constructed. Original implementation details unavailable from excerpt.
translation_notes: Translated as context-dependent mean-reversion strategy using SMA crossover as proxy for mean deviation. Entry when price deviates below/above SMA_20 (equilibrium estimate), exit on reversal cross. Actual backtest parameters (Sharpe ratio, period, transaction costs) are author-silent and cannot be encoded. This is a reasonable approximation but does not capture the sophisticated mean-reversion logic referenced in the signal definition.
